name: Gaming Max 17
shortSummary: High-refresh gaming laptop with powerful GPU for modern titles.
longDescription:
Gaming Max 17 targets players who want desktop-like performance in a portable form factor. It emphasizes fast graphics, a high-refresh display, and desktop-class storage for large game libraries.

Specifications:
- CPU: 14-core performance mobile processor
- RAM: 32 GB
- Storage: 1 TB SSD (with second M.2 slot available)
- GPU: Discrete gaming GPU with 12 GB VRAM
- Display: 17.3-inch IPS, 2560x1440, 165 Hz
- Battery life: up to 4 hours for light tasks; gaming on battery not recommended
- Weight: 2.9 kg

Frame rates stay competitive in recent AAA titles and esports games at the native resolution with tuned settings. The larger chassis helps thermal headroom under long gaming sessions compared to thin 14-inch machines.

Cooling is audible under full load but keeps clock speeds more stable than compact alternatives. The keyboard includes a numeric pad, which some users prefer for certain games and utilities.

This laptop is bulky for daily commuting and battery runtime is limited when pushing the GPU. It is a poor fit for silent offices or all-day unplugged use.

Gaming Max 17 is best for users who prioritize gaming and raw graphics performance over thinness, silence, and battery life.
